name: NIST SP 800-53 Security and Privacy Controls
note: A curated subset of controls most relevant to findings this platform produces; the full catalog is extensible via the KB.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Employ the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized access necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.description: Identify the event types the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function.

controls.title: Content of Audit Records
controls.description: Ensure audit records contain information establishing what, when, where, source, outcome, and identity.

controls.title: Penetration Testing
controls.description: Conduct penetration testing on the system or system components.

controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.description: Establish, document, and enforce secure configuration settings for system components.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.description: Manage system authenticators, including strength, protection, and lifecycle.

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities and remediate legitimate findings.

controls.title: Developer Testing and Evaluation
controls.description: Require developers to perform security and privacy testing and evaluation, including SAST/DAST.

controls.title: Development Process, Standards, and Tools
controls.description: Require a documented, secure development process, standards, and tools.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.description: Implement required cryptographic uses and types of cryptography.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.description: Identify, report, and correct system flaws in a timely manner.

controls.title: Malicious Code Protection
controls.description: Implement malicious code protection mechanisms at entry and exit points.

controls.title: Information Input Validation
controls.description: Check the validity of information inputs to the system.

controls.title: Error Handling
controls.description: Generate error messages that do not reveal exploitable information and reveal them only to authorized personnel.
